message:
Fix function type tracking, dicts, and list comp memory leaks

Agent 1: Function return type tracking - 5/8 function tests passing (up from 3/8)

Agent 2: Dict reference counting fix - 5/5 dict tests passing (100%)

Agent 3: List comprehension memory leak fixes - 3/3 list comp passing (100%)

Results: 53/80 → 59/80 passing (73.75% pass rate, +6 tests, +7.5%)
